title: Venezuelan Peanut Chicken Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl filled with chicken, peanuts, and spices, inspired by Venezuelan cuisine.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pilaf mix to the skillet and cook according to the package instructions.
Add the coconut milk to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the skillet and cook until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the peanuts and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Serve the chicken and pilaf mixture over the peanuts and garnish with additional peanuts if desired.
